shadow_mode_deltas.reason: Legacy prefix classification would label SKILL001 as managed_blocker, but the authoritative bundle assigns manual_prerequisite_blocker.

ticket_recommendations.title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
ticket_recommendations.summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

ticket_recommendations.title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text or stale synthesized guidance instead of current project-specific procedure
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Populate every required repo-local skill with concrete current rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler or stale synthesized workflow guidance.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Populate every required repo-local skill with concrete current rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler or stale synthesized workflow guidance.
